mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS id, p.name AS name, p.address AS address FROM plant p WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.is_main DESC, p.id ASC
SELECT p.id AS id, p.name AS name, p.address AS address FROM plant p WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} AND p.id = #{plantId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
